creator: Tor.Egge@idt.ntnu.no
text:
I have made a FreeBSD port of the 19961208 snapshot of FTP search. 

FTP search is a system for indexing/searching in the file names on ftp
servers. The source code is distributed under GPL conditions.

See http://ftpsearch.ntnu.no/ftpsearch for a running (but overloaded)
example.

See /usr/local/ftpsearch/INSTALL after installing the port for a description of
how to do some post-installation configuration.

Fix: 

Go to /usr/ports/net/ftpsearch and unpack 
ftp://ftpsearch.ntnu.no/pub/ftpsearch/ftpsearch-19961208-freebsd-port.tar.gz

MD5 (ftpsearch-19961208-freebsd-port.tar.gz) = e035ca9a84dce0584a0924b463fe27ba
